title: AI Full Stack Developer (with Data) - Fully Remote Opportunity
description:
We are hiring an AI Full Stack Engineer with strong
experience in .NET, Python, SQL, and React/Angular. The role
involves developing AI-powered workflows, data-driven
applications, and scalable governance systems using the
Microsoft AI ecosystem.

Key Requirements

- Strong experience in .NET (C# / ASP.NET Core) and Python
- Expertise in Advanced SQL (mandatory)
- Frontend development using React and/or Angular
- Experience with Azure OpenAI / LLM-based applications
- Exposure to Agentic AI / Microsoft Agent Framework / Foundry
  Agents (preferred)
- Experience with Databricks / data platforms / APIs
- Good understanding of microservices and cloud (Azure
  preferred)

Good to Have

- Experience in governance, risk, or audit platforms
- Knowledge of RAG, embeddings, and vector search
- Exposure to enterprise SaaS / multi-tenant systems
responsibilities: Develop AI-powered workflows using LLM-based applications and Azure OpenAI
Build data-driven full-stack applications with .NET, Python, and React/Angular frontends
Design and implement scalable governance systems leveraging AI capabilities
Integrate Agentic AI and Microsoft Agent Framework into enterprise solutions
Work with Databricks and data platforms to build data pipelines and APIs
Develop microservices architecture on Azure cloud infrastructure
use_cases: AI-powered governance, risk, and audit platforms
Agentic AI systems using Microsoft Agent Framework
RAG-based enterprise search and knowledge retrieval
Data-driven SaaS applications with multi-tenant architecture
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves building AI-powered workflows and LLM-
based applications using Azure OpenAI, Agentic AI, and
Microsoft Agent Framework. The developer is directly
implementing and deploying AI systems (not just supporting
infrastructure), making it ai-first despite also involving
general full-stack work.
